title: Custom Requests
subtitle: Browse custom crafting requests from buyers worldwide
proposalPlaceholder: Describe how you would fulfill this request...
requestDescPlaceholder: Describe what you want created in detail...

createRequest.title: Create Custom Request
createRequest.titlePlaceholder: E.g., Custom ceramic vase with Egyptian motifs
createRequest.descPlaceholder: Describe your ideal product in detail — materials, colors, size, style, purpose. The more detail you provide, the better the AI previews will be...
createRequest.dragDrop: Drag and drop your reference image here
createRequest.orBrowse: or click to browse from your device
createRequest.aiPoweredDesc: Describe what you want and our AI will automatically generate visual previews to help artisans understand your vision.
createRequest.aiMagicDesc: Your request has been saved. Our AI is enhancing your description and generating visual previews for artisans...
createRequest.successDescAI: Your custom request is live. AI-generated visual previews will appear on your request page shortly — artisans can already see and respond to your request.
createRequest.successDescUpload: Your custom request is live with your reference image. Artisans can now see and submit proposals for your request.
createRequest.budgetMin: Budget must be at least $1 USD
